description: This file contains TypeScript code implementing remark plugins for processing MDX/Markdown files. It defines plugins for replacing configuration values and documentation references within markdown content, supporting features like frontmatter processing and AST node transformations.

methods.name: replaceConfigInText
methods.description: Replaces config placeholders in text with actual config values based on the provided path.

methods.name: replaceConfigInAttributes
methods.description: Replaces config placeholders within MDX JSX attributes.

methods.name: replaceDocsrefInText
methods.description: Replaces documentation reference placeholders with versioned documentation paths.

methods.name: replaceDocsrefInAttributes
methods.description: Replaces documentation reference placeholders within MDX JSX attributes.

methods.name: getConfigValueAtPath
methods.description: Retrieves a nested configuration value given a dot-separated path.

methods.name: replaceInFrontmatter
methods.description: Recursively replaces string values in frontmatter with processed values.
